title: ConsoleLab Authority Decision — v1
description: Locked contract for ConsoleLab authority traffic. ConsoleLab receives an AuthorityRequest packet and returns an AuthorityDecision packet. ConsoleLab is the only component that produces AuthorityDecision packets; bots and runtimes never authorize. Every decision (including REJECTED and NEEDS_INFO) is bound to an immutable evidence stamp in 04_EVIDENCE_ROOM.

RequiredNext.description: Deterministic repair hint for NEEDS_INFO decisions. The runtime can re-submit a fully repaired AuthorityRequest by adding the listed axes/scopes. Absent on APPROVED, REJECTED, and unbound packets.

axes.description: Top-level authority axes that were missing or empty in the inbound request.

scopes.description: Specific approval scopes the runtime must add to satisfy the policy class.

event_id.description: Identifier of the JSONL line written to 04_EVIDENCE_ROOM. Format: <ts>-<tx_hash[0:16]>.

tx_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical evidence entry.

ref_path.description: Repo-relative path of the JSONL artifact carrying this evidence line (e.g. 04_EVIDENCE_ROOM/audit_trails/events.jsonl).

AuthorityRequest.title: AuthorityRequest
AuthorityRequest.description: Inbound packet asking ConsoleLab to render an authority decision. The envelope (schema_version, tracking_id, action, payload, requested_by, ts) is structurally required. The authority axes (scope, standard, policy) are runtime-checked: when missing or empty, ConsoleLab returns NEEDS_INFO with reason=<axis>_missing and an evidenceStamp pointing at the immutable refusal record.

scope.description: Approval scopes that must concur for APPROVED. Runtime-required: an empty or absent array surfaces NEEDS_INFO with reason=scope_missing.

payload.description: Free-form structured payload describing what the runtime is asking for. Hashed for the signature.

AuthorityDecision.title: AuthorityDecision
AuthorityDecision.description: Outbound packet returned by ConsoleLab. Carries the decision, the scope/standard/policy axes that were checked, an evidenceStamp pointing to the immutable record in 04_EVIDENCE_ROOM, and a signature over payloadHash.

signature.description: Base64 signature over payloadHash, produced by the ConsoleLab active signing key.

reason.description: Required when decision != APPROVED; identifies why the decision was not APPROVED.
